content.en:
There are 5,000 to 5,999 on the side of the 5,000 territory, that is, there are a total of 1,000 extradimensional territories, and according to the rule that the smaller the serial number of the extradimensional territory, the richer the energy, the 5,991 territory should be the reciprocal extradimensional territory.

But only the countdown extra-dimensional realms all have third-realm powerhouses, which is much stronger than the six-thousandth realm!

The Lord of the Moon Realm said: "It is normal for the Territory of Five Thousand Nine Hundred and Ninety-One to have a third realm, any extradimensional territory here has a third realm, but the number is not too much, almost all of them are third realms that are difficult to progress in strength and have defects, and there is no possibility of breaking through the fourth realm, so they will stay here and not go to the adventure, so the possibility of falling is also low." But the really powerful one is the Five Thousand Realm, where there are many third realms, and even some fourth realms. "

"Zero Twenty-Seven" "Is there a fifth realm in the Five Thousand Territory?" Ye Tian asked.

"No!" the Moon Realm Lord shook his head, "There is no fifth realm in the Five Thousand Realm, it is said that if you want to achieve the fifth realm, the requirements are extremely high, and I don't know what the specific requirements are." "

There was no fifth realm on the side of the Five Thousand Territory, and Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

In this way, he is acting here, and he is not afraid of being traced in the future.

"There's some Nine-Eyed Spider up ahead!"

Ye Tian guessed that these nine-eyed giant spiders should have come to intercept him and wanted to kill him.

This is the territory of the Nine-Eyed Spider, and it is not easy to completely avoid the Nine-Eyed Spider clan.

"Then kill!"

Ye Tian was not afraid at all, a superdimensional creature clan without a third realm, what was he afraid of.

Soon, these nine-eyed giant spiders arrived.

Six second realms, thirteen first realms, such a scale is already extremely powerful, placed in the six thousand realm, and only powerful extradimensional forces have such a scale.

The cultivation of the Nine-Eyed Giant Spider Clan in these second realms is not very high, and the most powerful one is only in the late stage of the second realm, and the extra-dimensional rules emanating from their bodies are not high, and it is estimated that the highest is only about a thousand super-dimensional rules.

For Ye Tian, these nine-eyed giant spiders were too weak, like ants.

Rumble!!!!!

These nine-eyed giant spiders slaughtered Ye Tian.

At this moment, the incomparably powerful extradimensional rules descended, binding these nine-eyed giant spiders.

"Shattered!"

In an instant, these nine-eyed giant spiders shattered, turned into countless fragments, and fell to their deaths.

With a wave of his hand, Ye Tian took away the treasures on these nine-eyed giant spiders, and then quickly left here.

He was then attacked several times, but he killed them all.

Later, no nine-eyed giant spider would dare to attack and kill him.

......

Yunlan Realm.

This is one of the extradimensional realms of the 5991st realm, and it is also the extradimensional realm where the cloud and rain realm lord is located.

The Cloud and Rain Realm Lord is the only third realm in this extradimensional realm, and he has been guarding the Yunlan Realm for a long time.

With such a third realm in charge, the Yunlan Realm is very safe, and there are no strong people to kill in battle, and those extradimensional realms are very disciplined and will not kill here.

This also caused the Yunlan Realm to attract a large number of extradimensional realms, and there were the existence of the first realm and the second realm everywhere.

After Ye Tian came to the Yunlan Realm, he felt the prosperity here.

Moreover, he had also heard that the Cloud and Rain Realm Lord often preached, mainly on the way of extradimensional rules, so that some extradimensional rules fell into the second realm of the bottleneck, and it was easy to break the shackles and improve the realm of extradimensional rules.

There was even the first realm that listened to the lectures of the Cloud and Rain Realm again and again, and also comprehended the rules of the extradimensional realm, so as to advance to the second realm.

Therefore, the reputation of the Cloud Rain Realm Lord in the territory of 5991 is very good.

However, this method is only suitable for some extradimensional realms that have no chance, and it is impossible to quickly improve by relying on endless long years to slowly comprehend the extradimensional rules.

Ye Tian naturally wouldn't stay in the territory of No. 5991, this was just his transit point.

"I wonder if the Tianyang Realm Lord has anything to do?"

Ye Tian contacted the Tianyang Realm Lord.

Soon.

The Tianyang Realm Lord sent a message back. []

"Lord Ye Tian Realm, I don't have anything to do, I'm just a little injured and I've lost a little bit of my clan!"

The tone of the Tianyang Realm Lord was a little low, and it could be seen that the number of clansmen who had lost was estimated to be quite .........

This is also something that can't be helped, in the middle of the battle, no matter how much you protect the void in your body, once you are injured, the power penetrates into your body, and it will naturally cause damage to the void in your body.

The first realm would definitely be fine, but the weak realm gods would suffer, and the coercion of wisps of power would be enough to kill them countless times.

Soon.

Ye Tian met with the Tianyang Realm Lord in the Yunlan Realm.

"Tianyang Realm Lord, your injuries are not light!"

Ye Tian frowned.

The Lord of the Tianyang Realm said helplessly: "It's good to survive, that Nine-Eyed Giant Spider Clan is too powerful, so many Second Realms, if it's a little later, I will fall." "

"What's next for you?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Tianyang Realm Lord pondered for a moment and said, "I'm going to stay in the Yunlan Realm, I still underestimate the danger here, with my current state, even if I reach the Five Thousand Realm, it is extremely dangerous. And the Yunlan Realm is still safer, find a place to develop the strength of the Tianyang Family, and wait for the strength to improve in the future, and then go to the Five Thousand Territory. Moreover, there is also a deal with the 5000th Territory, and a lot of resources can be bought, so there is no need to pay too much price. "

"It's good!"

Ye Tian also felt that the choice of the Tianyang Realm Lord was very good, if he insisted on going to the Five Thousand Territory, he might fall.

After all, going from the 5,991 Territory to the 51.1 Thousand Territory alone, there are too many realms to pass through in between, and a little danger is enough to kill the Tianyang Realm Lord.

The safest way is to take the flight of some forces, so that the safest route to the territory of the Five Thousand is the safest, but if you take a flight, you can only go over by the Tianyang Realm Lord yourself, and you can't carry the Tianyang family members in your body, unless he buys a ticket for every clan, then the cost will be terrifying.

A clansman in units of 100 million, even the third realm can't afford to pay this fee.

Therefore, it was impossible for the Tianyang Realm Lord to take those clansmen to the Five Thousand Territory.

Ye Tian chatted with the Tianyang Realm Lord, stayed in the Yunlan Realm for a few more days, and then prepared to go to other realms.

At this time, it's best to ask the opinion of the lord of the moon realm.
